outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility expected. Negative total GEX (-4.22B combined) indicates dealers are short gamma, which will amplify price movements. Expect acceleration on any directional break, particularly below 600 support.
outlook.summary: Market positioned in short gamma regime with extreme bearish sentiment (PCR 1.79-2.00 across expiries). Spot hovering near critical 600 RESONANCE support and 605.5 Max Pain magnet. Smirk skew confirms fear premium in puts. Primary thesis: magnetic attraction to 605.5 with high probability of volatility spike if 600 breaks. Dealers will amplify selling pressure below support levels.

levels.motivazione: CRITICAL: Major PUT WALL across 4 expiries with 196,336 total OI. 0DTE shows 96,278 volume (2.4x OI) indicating heavy dealer hedging activity. Combined with Max Pain proximity, this is the most significant structural level.
Max Pain convergence at 605-606 in 4/5 expiries. Only 0.21% from spot. Market maker target for minimal option payout. Strong magnetic attraction expected in short gamma environment.
Complex structure with 126,193 total OI across all 5 expiries. PUT-dominant in 3/5 expiries but CALL resistance in 0DTE (17,419). Creates friction and potential pinning behavior.
Dominant CALL WALL across 5 expiries (103,405 total OI). Highest CALL OI in WEEKLY_1, WEEKLY_2, MONTHLY_1, and MONTHLY_2. Defines the upside ceiling with smirk skew confirmation.
Secondary PUT WALL with 169,865 total OI across 4 expiries. 0DTE highest PUT OI (56,084). Deep support at -3.18% from spot. Critical backstop if 600 breaks.
Strong PUT concentration with 62,550 OI in WEEKLY_1 (highest single-strike OI). Total 113,011 OI across 3 expiries. First support test below spot at -1.53%.
Significant CALL OI (15,120 in 0DTE) with put skew reinforcement. First resistance test above spot at +1.78%. Monthly structure shows 30,392 PUT OI creating ceiling.

outlook.volatilityExpectation: LOW: Positive GEX suppresses volatility despite bearish smirk skew
outlook.summary: Bearish smirk skew across all expiries with elevated PCR (1.63 0DTE) indicates fear, but positive GEX creates dealer stability. Max Pain at 24950 acts as primary magnet near spot. Expect range-bound behavior between 24500 structural support and 25325 gamma flip.
